column2: Introduction to computational thinking for design and fabrication. Covers parametric design, digital fabrication techniques, and the use of software tools for translating design concepts into physical prototypes.

- Parametric design (Grasshopper, Fusion 360)
- 2D/3D modeling fundamentals
- Laser cutting, 3D printing basics
- CNC machining concepts
- Design for Manufacturing (DFM)
- None (or ENGG1110 co-req)
- Product design
